name: 22_a_miss_b_met
description: Branch 3 / Interaction: System A fails (resets); System B condition met (increments + may break). Independence test 2.
derivation: Outer pass, gate pass. System A: safe_hwm 0.5 >= cross 2.0 FALSE -> vwap_ticks reset to 0 (lost the 2). is_vwap_broken False. System B: current_return -1.2 <= bleed_arm -1.0 TRUE -> new_bleed_ticks = 2+1 = 3. bleed_broken = (3 >= 3) TRUE. Returns (0, 3, False, True). Independence: System A's prev count 2 was wiped DESPITE System B breaking.
